attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PRD_WARRITEM_MP)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.PROD_MAP_ID, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.PRODUCT_FAMILY, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.PRODUCT_ID, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.PRODUCT_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.DOCUMENT_ID, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.DOCUMENT_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.WARRANTY_ITEM_ID, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.WARRANTY_ITEM, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.COVERAGE_TEMPLATE, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.SOURCE, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.DURATION, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.UOM, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.START_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.END_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP,
(
select PROD_MAP_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP
minus
select PROD_MAP_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP
) ACM
where 
 ACM.PROD_MAP_ID = STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.PROD_MAP_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCSS_MKT_PROD_WARRITEM_MAP.REFRESH_DATETIME
